task: Add a Box Combo to my bag with Diet Coke as the drink, and a Kids Combo with milk as the drink. Select the store closest to ZIP 10001 for pickup tomorrow at 12:00 PM.
thoughts: I'll help you complete this task on the Raising Cane's website. Let me start by navigating there.
I can see the Raising Cane's website. Let me first deny the geolocation permission and accept cookies, then click "Order Now" to start the ordering process.
I need to accept cookies first. Let me click the "Accept Cookies" button.
Cookies are accepted. Now let me click "Order Now" to start the ordering process.
I can see the restaurant picker page. Let me enter ZIP code 10001 to find the closest store.
I can see the restaurant picker page. Let me enter ZIP code 10001 to find the closest store.
I can see the restaurant picker page. Let me enter ZIP code 10001 to find the closest store.
The text doesn't appear to have been entered. Let me try clicking directly on the input field and typing again.
I can see the cursor is now in the text field. Let me type the ZIP code and search.
I can see the cursor is now in the text field. Let me type the ZIP code and search.
I can see "10001" is now in the search field. The Enter press might not have triggered the search. Let me click the search icon to search.

I can see the search results are starting to show. The first result is "Raising Cane's® #987" at "1 Penn Plaza, New York, NY 10119" which is 0.2 miles away. This is the closest store. Let me scroll down to see the full result and click on it.
I can see the closest store is "Raising Cane's® #987" at 1 Penn Plaza, New York, NY 10119 (0.2 miles away). Let me click "ORDER NOW" to select this store.
A dialog appeared asking me to choose the order type. "INDIVIDUAL" is already selected. Let me deny the geolocation permission and click "CONFIRM" to proceed.
Now I see a dialog asking when I want to pick up - "ASAP" or "LATER". Since the task says pickup tomorrow at 12:00 PM, I need to select "LATER".
"LATER" is now selected and there's a "Select a day" dropdown. Let me click on it to select tomorrow's date.
I can see the select dropdown opened with options. I need to select "Tomorrow, Sunday, March 1st" which is index 2.
"Tomorrow, Sunday, March 1st" is selected. Now I need to select a time. Let me click the "Select a time" dropdown to choose 12:00 PM.
I can see the time dropdown with all options. I need to select "12:00 PM" which is at index 11. Let me select it.
I've selected "Tomorrow, Sunday, March 1st" and "12:00 PM". Now I can see the "CONTINUE ORDER" button is becoming active. Let me click it to proceed.

Excellent! I'm now on the menu page. I can see:
- Pickup At: 1 Penn Plaza
- Ready By: Tomorrow At 12:00 PM

I can see a "COMBOS" section at the bottom. Let me scroll down to find the Box Combo to add to the bag.
I can see the "COMBOS" section. Let me click on it to find the Box Combo.
I'm now on the Combos page. I can see combo items starting at the bottom. Let me scroll down to see the available combos and find the Box Combo.
I can see "THE BOX COMBO®" on the left at $14.99. Let me click on it to add it to my order.

I'm now on the Box Combo customization page. I can see "CUSTOMIZE YOUR BOX COMBO" with options to choose. I need to scroll down to find the drink selection and change it to Diet Coke. Let me scroll down to see the customization options.

I can see customization options - "REGULAR" is selected (with a checkmark). I can also see options for NO SLAW, NO TOAST, NO FRIES, and an "WANT AN EXTRA CANE'S SAUCE?" section. I need to scroll down more to find the drink selection option.
I can see the "CHOOSE DRINK" section with required options. Let me scroll down more to see all drink options and find Diet Coke.
I can see the drink options. I can see Diet Coke in the bottom row (third from left). Let me click on it.
A "DIET COKE" dialog appeared asking for size - "Regular" or "Large +$0.30". I'll select "Regular" and then click "ADD".
"Regular" is selected and "Cane's Ice" is also selected by default. The "ADD" button is now active (red). Let me click "ADD" to add the Diet Coke drink selection.

I can see Diet Coke is now selected (it has a box outline around it). The "ADD TO ORDER $14.99" button is now active. Let me scroll down to verify Diet Coke is properly selected with a checkmark, then click "ADD TO ORDER".
Diet Coke is selected with a checkmark (Regular size, 0 Cal). Now let me click "ADD TO ORDER $14.99" to add the Box Combo to my bag.

The Box Combo has been added to the basket! I can see the yellow banner saying "ITEM ADDED - The Box Combo® has been added to your basket." and the cart icon shows "1" item. 

Now I need to find and add the Kids Combo with milk. Let me scroll down to find it on the menu, or I might need to look in a different section. Let me scroll down to see more menu categories.
I can see the menu with COMBOS and TAILGATES sections, and there are more categories below. I need to scroll down more to find the Kids Combo section.
The page doesn't seem to be scrolling further. The Kids Combo is likely inside the COMBOS category. Let me click on COMBOS to see all combos.
I'm on the Combos page. I need to scroll down to find the Kids Combo among the combo options. Let me scroll down to see all combos.
I can see The Box Combo and The 3 Finger Combo. I need to scroll down more to find the Kids Combo.
I can see The Caniac Combo and The Sandwich Combo, and there's another combo starting at the bottom. Let me scroll down more to see if that's the Kids Combo.
I found "THE KIDS COMBO" at $8.49 - "2 Chicken Fingers 1 Cane's Sauce® Crinkle-Cut Fries Kids Drink". Let me click on it to customize and add it with milk.
I'm on the Kids Combo page. I can see "CHOOSE KIDS MEAL" section with options. I need to scroll down to find the drink selection and choose milk. Let me scroll down.
